title: Holomorphic curves in Base Spaces of Families of Polarized Manifolds
author_string: Steven Lu, Ruiran Sun, Kang Zuo
abstract: For a smooth family $V \to U$ of polarized manifolds with semi-ample canonical sheaves, we show the following result: any entire curve must be contained in the fibers of the classifying map from the base space $U$ to the moduli space. This settles the Relative Isotriviality Conjecture, \cite[Conjecture 1.5]{DLSZ}.
